case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. CALL AND HAUL INC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT CALL AND HAUL INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALL AND HAUL INC $12,875.00 PRINCIPAL, $889.98 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,064.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
